text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during an extended period of intense
training, Super Creek approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Did you know Tamtam is growing vegetables?
Want to take a little break and go have a look?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, you have so many different types of
vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Pretty cool, yeah? The li'l runts saved their
allowances and sent me the seeds.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, my li'l siblings.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They say I'll get real fast if I eat a buncha tasty
veggies.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But it takes 'em forever to grow. Haha!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You look like you're enjoying yourself,
Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, ya know. I'll let y'all eat some too
when they get nice and big!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after visiting Tamamo Cross's
vegetable patch, Super Creek and I are discussing
training, when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Man... I used fertilizer and everythin'...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey. You guys want somethin'?
choice_data_list:
You mentioned something about fertilizer just
now...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Are your vegetables not doing well?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh... Heh. Yeah, well, it's no biggie.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll figure somethin' out! No worries!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Tamtam? Why don't we look into it
together?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whatcha mean by that?
choice_data_list: Let's find a way to perk your veggies up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya seriously don't need ta worry 'bout it. I bet
you're all busy and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like we got a pro veggie grower
'round here just readily available ta help us. It's
not somethin' ya can easily look up either, so it'd
be a waste of ti—
choice_data_list:
I'm sure there's someone around with the
know-how.

I'm sure there's someone around with the
know-how.

If we work together, we'll find an answer in no
time.

If we work together, we'll find an answer in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like we got a pro veggie grower
'round here just readily available ta help us. It's
not somethin' ya can easily look up either, so it'd
be a waste of ti—
choice_data_list:
I'm sure there's someone around with the
know-how.

I'm sure there's someone around with the
know-how.

If we work together, we'll find an answer in no
time.

If we work together, we'll find an answer in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Oh, what about Flower? Why don't
we go and ask her?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Flower? Ya mean Nishino Flower?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya don't gotta come along. I can go and ask
myself.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think it'd be best if we all pepped these
veggies up together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You, Trainer, and me! Let's go shower them with
affection!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Everything shines more brightly when raised with
lots of love.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
L-love? I dunno how ya say such embarrassin'
things with a straight face...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...It's just a buncha veggies.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I know you don't see them that way.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just the vegetables that I want to
shower with love.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My adorable little Tamtam! I want to smother you
with affection too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: H-hell no! Your affection's way too sweet!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, look at you getting all embarrassed.
Adorable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles at the sight of Tamamo
Cross's flushed cheeks.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I couldn't agree more.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Listen. Yer gettin' too caught up in my business.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't want you postponin' your trainin' just to
help me out.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness... Did you hear that, Trainer? What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I agree!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? That don't make sense! The hell ya sayin'?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You may as well give in to the inevitable.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
While training is important, we can always make
up the lost time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But vegetables are living things. Let's all work
together to save them, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nnh...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Their lives were a precious gift from someone
special. Right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. You're right, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry, and thanks for the help!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Glad to be of service! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles in response to Tamamo
Cross's words of gratitude.
